fields.name: status
fields.comment: Current status of this processing step: PENDING, RUNNING, COMPLETED, or FAILED

fields.name: startedAt
fields.comment: Timestamp (epoch millis) when this step started processing

fields.name: completedAt
fields.comment: Timestamp (epoch millis) when this step finished processing

fields.name: durationMs
fields.comment: Elapsed time in milliseconds from start to completion

fields.name: logLines
fields.comment: Detail log lines for this step, each with a severity and message
